message:
fix(session): unify file stat logic through WAL-aware session_file_stats helper

session.rs and session_picker.rs each had inline stat logic that only
measured the primary .sqlite file, causing WAL-active sessions to be
mis-ranked by age and under-reported by size during fallback resume
scans and session picker ordering.

Consolidate all call sites through session_index::session_file_stats
(renamed from the private file_stats and made pub(crate)) which already
accounts for -wal and -shm sidecars by taking the max mtime and summing
sizes across all three files.

Add regression tests verifying that WAL sidecar changes invalidate
stale known entries and are reflected in build_meta_from_sqlite output.

Addresses bd-3bcjq and bd-mjxes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
